prompt_template:
Write a compelling introduction for an article about laser cleaning {material} surfaces. Target audience: {target_audience} in {industry_focus}.

Requirements:
- Exactly {word_target} words
- Natural, engaging tone (natural voice target: {natural_voice_target})
- Include key benefits of laser cleaning for {material}
- Mention technical precision without being overly technical (depth level: {technical_depth})
- Hook the reader with practical value
- Do not include headers or titles
- Focus on real-world applications

Content quality must meet threshold: {content_quality_threshold}
